meaning: adj.使低劣的,减少体力的,昏暗的
examples: She never cheapened herself by lowering her standards.
The Japanese are expert at lowering manufacturing costs.
The lowering of trade barriers has led to a free-for-all among exporters.
More important, golfers can do their part by lowering expectations of plush carpets of green grass.
This will typically tend to have a knock on effect on lowering annuity rates.
